ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charging_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the charging station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the charging station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the charging station is located */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the charging station is located */,
  "zip_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the charging station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the charging station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the charging station */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the charging station */,
  "number_of_ports" INTEGER /* Number of charging ports available at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., operational, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the station's website or more information */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility information (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging session */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station where the session took place */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being charged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the charging session */,
  "start_date_time" TEXT /* Start date and time of the charging session */,
  "start_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the start date and time */,
  "end_date_time" TEXT /* End date and time of the charging session */,
  "end_time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the end date and time */,
  "total_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the charging session */,
  "charging_time" TEXT /* Time taken for charging during the session */,
  "energy_kWh" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed in kWh during the session */,
  "connector_type" TEXT /* Type of connector used for charging */,
  "session_cost" REAL /* Cost of the charging session */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, app) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charging_sessions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging session associated with these savings */,
  "savings_date" TEXT /* Date when the savings were calculated */,
  "ghg_savings_kg" REAL /* Amount of greenhouse gas savings in kilograms */,
  "gasoline_savings_gallons" REAL /* Amount of gasoline savings in gallons */,
  "savings_source" TEXT /* Source of the savings data (e.g., estimated, actual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_savings_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES charging_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charging_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the type of charging station */,
  "port_type" TEXT /* Type of port (e.g., Level 2, DC Fast Charge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the charging type */,
  "max_power_kw" REAL /* Maximum power output in kilowatts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_types" (
  "station_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the station type record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of charging station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Cost of installing the station */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_types_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_types_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES charging_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for usage statistics record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the day of the week (0=Sunday, 6=Saturday) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Textual representation of the day of the week */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of charging sessions during that day */,
  "total_energy_used" REAL /* Total energy consumed during that day in kWh */,
  "average_session_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of charging sessions */,
  "average_energy_used" REAL /* Average energy used per session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station under maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next inspection */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES staff_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the charging station (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the management to the feedback */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the issue has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES staff_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the report (e.g., 24 hours, 7 days) */,
  "total_energy_used" REAL /* Total energy consumed by the station on the report date */,
  "total_ghg_savings" REAL /* Total GHG savings reported on the date */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of charging sessions during the report period */,
  "average_energy_used" REAL /* Average energy used per session during the report period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)
